facebook.content:
You know what time it is? It's time to worship, baby! We've got a couple of ways to get this praise party started.

First Saturdays of every month at 12 Noon, we gather in person at 24301 Telegraph in Southfield, MI, for a time of worship, prayer, and connection. It's the perfect way to kick off your month with purpose and passion.

Or, if you can't join us in person, tune in to our Hour of Power on Facebook Live daily from Monday to Friday at 8:15 AM.

Join us for worship
